hero.description: Experience luxury and reliability with our premium fleet. From airport transfers to special events, we've got you covered.

services.section_description: From airport transfers to special events, we provide comprehensive transportation solutions tailored to your needs.
services.airport_transfer_desc: Reliable and comfortable airport pickup and drop-off services.
services.intercity_trips_desc: Long-distance travel with professional drivers and premium vehicles.
services.wedding_events_desc: Make your special day memorable with our luxury wedding cars.
services.business_meetings_desc: Professional transportation for corporate events and meetings.

promo.headline: Get 70% Off Your First Booking!
promo.description: New customers get an exclusive discount on their first rental. Limited time offer - don't miss out!
promo.terms: *Terms and conditions apply. Valid for first-time customers only.

fleet.choose: Choose from our carefully curated selection of luxury and premium vehicles for any occasion.

why_choose_us.title: Why Choose Caros?
why_choose_us.safe_desc: All our vehicles are regularly maintained and insured for your peace of mind.
why_choose_us.service_desc: Round-the-clock availability for airport transfers and emergency bookings.
why_choose_us.quality_desc: Only the finest vehicles with top-notch amenities and professional drivers.
why_choose_us.selection_desc: From economy to luxury, we have the perfect vehicle for every occasion.
why_choose_us.drivers_desc: Experienced, licensed, and courteous drivers for a comfortable journey.
why_choose_us.awards_desc: Recognized for excellence in customer service and vehicle quality.

footer.company: Premium car rental and transport services. Your trusted partner for all your transportation needs.

booking.title: Book Your Ride
booking.description: Reserve this premium vehicle for your next journey. Our team is ready to assist you with the booking process.
